title: Replace brand logo with user-provided two-line logo

requirements.summary: Replace existing brand logo with user-uploaded two-line logo preserving exact visual fidelity
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded two-line logo appears in the header navigation exactly as provided
Logo maintains its original dimensions, colors, and clarity
Logo is saved as brand-logo.dim_200x60.png in frontend/public/assets/generated
No automatic resizing, compression, or filtering is applied to the logo
Logo displays correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports

file_operations.description: Replace the existing brand-logo.dim_200x60.png with the user-provided two-line logo image (frontend/public/assets/two line logo resized.png). This is a direct file replacement with no modifications, compression, or re-encoding applied to preserve exact visual fidelity including dimensions, colors, and clarity.

Verify that the header navigation correctly references and displays the logo from /assets/generated/brand-logo.dim_200x60.png. Ensure the img element uses appropriate attributes to prevent browser-side resizing or compression. Confirm logo displays correctly in both desktop and mobile navigation contexts without any CSS transforms or filters that might alter its appearance.
